headline: Friday discipline: stop the weekend spiral before it starts
summary: You're gaining 0.08 kg/week when you need to lose 0.63 kg/week—that's a 0.71 kg gap every single week. Today you stop making it worse.
details: Skip the emotional snacking entirely today; use Huel for at least 2 meals and plan one solid vegan dinner before hunger hits. Hit the rowing machine or treadmill for 45 minutes this morning or afternoon—no excuses, no 'later.' Today matters because Friday is where your week derails: one day of discipline now prevents a weekend of damage and gets you 1 kg closer by next Friday.
